testcase.name: block queries > a block query without parameters > should return the latest known block
block queries > a block query without parameters > should respond with a block according to the requested schema
block queries > a block query by hash > should return the block with that hash, given that block exists
block queries > a block query by hash > should return blocks according to the requested schema
block queries > a block query by hash > should return a null block, given a block with that hash doesn't exist
block queries > a block query by hash > should return an error, when the hash is invalid (malformed)
block queries > a block query by height > should return the block with that height, given a valid height
block queries > a block query by height > should return a blocks according to the requested schema
block queries > a block query by height > should return the genesis block, given height=0 is requested
block queries > a block query by height > should return an empty body answer, given that block height requested is the maximum available height
block queries > a block query by height > should return an error, given an invalid height
block queries > a block query by height and hash > should return an error, as only one parameter at a time can be used
genesis block > a block query to the genesis block > should contain transactions with pre-fund wallet utxos
genesis block > a block query to the genesis block > should contain utxos related to exactly 4 pre-fund wallets
genesis block > a block query to the genesis block > should contain utxos with exactly 1 token type
genesis block > a block query to the genesis block > should contain utxos sorted by outputIndex in ascending order
genesis block > a block query to the genesis block > should contain valid index ranges on regular transactions
contract queries > a contract query by address > should return success as they are valid contract addresses
contract queries > a contract query by address > should return the most recent action for a contract with multiple actions
contract queries > a contract query by address > should return null when contract with that address does not exist
contract queries > a contract query by address > should return an error for malformed addresses
contract queries > a contract query by address and offset > should return the correct action using exact block hash where it was included
contract queries > a contract query by address and offset > should return the latest state using a future block hash
contract queries > a contract query by address and offset > should respond with a contract action according to the expected schema
contract queries > a contract query by address and offset > should return the correct action using exact block height where it was included
contract queries > a contract query by address and offset > should return the latest state using a future block height
contract queries > a contract query by address and offset > should return the most recent contract action for that address before the specified block
contract queries > a contract query by address and offset > should return null when contract with valid address and valid offset does not exist
contract queries > a contract query by address and offset > should return null when contract with valid address and non-existing hash does not exist
contract queries > a contract query by address and offset > should return error when contract with invalid address and valid hash
contract queries > a contract query by address and offset > should return error when contract with invalid address and non-existing hash
contract queries > a contract query by address and offset > should return error when contract with valid address and invalid hash
contract queries > a contract query by address and offset > should return error when contract with invalid address and invalid hash
contract queries > a contract query by address and offset > should return null when contract with valid address and valid height does not exist
contract queries > a contract query by address and offset > should return null when contract with valid address and non-existing height does not exist
contract queries > a contract query by address and offset > should return error when contract with invalid address and valid height
contract queries > a contract query by address and offset > should return error when contract with invalid address and invalid height
contract queries > a contract query by address and offset > should return error for negative height
contract queries > a contract query by address and offset > should return error for non-integer height
contract queries > a contract query by address and offset > should return error for extremely large height
contract queries > a contract query by address and offset > should return null when using a block hash from before the action existed
dust commitment merkle tree update queries > a collapsed update query with valid index range > should return a collapsed update for a valid index range
dust commitment merkle tree update queries > a collapsed update query with valid index range > should respond with a collapsed update according to the expected schema
dust commitment merkle tree update queries > a collapsed update query with valid index range > should return a collapsed update for the full genesis dust range
dust commitment merkle tree update queries > a collapsed update query with equal start and end indices > should return a valid update when startIndex equals endIndex
dust commitment merkle tree update queries > a collapsed update query idempotency > should return identical results for the same query parameters
dust commitment merkle tree update queries > a collapsed update query with invalid index range > should return an error when startIndex is greater than endIndex
dust commitment merkle tree update queries > a collapsed update query with invalid index range > should return an error when indices are negative
dust commitment merkle tree update queries > a collapsed update query with invalid index range > should return an error when endIndex is beyond the indexed range
dust generation merkle tree update queries > a collapsed update query with valid index range > should return a collapsed update for a valid index range
dust generation merkle tree update queries > a collapsed update query with valid index range > should respond with a collapsed update according to the expected schema
dust generation merkle tree update queries > a collapsed update query with valid index range > should return a collapsed update for the full genesis dust range
dust generation merkle tree update queries > a collapsed update query with equal start and end indices > should return a valid update when startIndex equals endIndex
dust generation merkle tree update queries > a collapsed update query idempotency > should return identical results for the same query parameters
dust generation merkle tree update queries > a collapsed update query with invalid index range > should return an error when startIndex is greater than endIndex
dust generation merkle tree update queries > a collapsed update query with invalid index range > should return an error when indices are negative
dust generation merkle tree update queries > a collapsed update query with invalid index range > should return an error when endIndex is beyond the indexed range
dust generations queries > a dust generations query with a valid Cardano reward address > should return dust generations for a registered address
dust generations queries > a dust generations query with a valid Cardano reward address > should respond with dust generations according to the expected schema
dust generations queries > a dust generations query with a valid Cardano reward address > should return registrations with valid fields for a registered address
dust generations queries > a dust generations query with multiple addresses > should return dust generations for multiple addresses
dust generations queries > a dust generations query with non-registered address > should return empty registrations for a non-registered address
dust generations queries > a dust generations query with invalid input > should return an empty result for an empty addresses array
dust generations queries > a dust generations query with invalid input > should return an error for a malformed address
dust generations queries > a dustGenerations query with a multi-UTXO stake key (#926) > should aggregate nightBalance across all backing cNIGHT UTXOs
dust generations queries > backwards compatibility with dustGenerationStatus > should return consistent data from both endpoints for a registered address
dust generation status queries > a dust generation status query with a valid Cardano reward address > should respond with a dust generation status response according to the requested schema
dust generation status queries > a dust generation status query with a valid Cardano reward address > should report registered status for a registered Cardano reward address

dust generation status queries > a dust generation status query with a valid Cardano reward address > should give the DUST destination address for the expected network when Cardano reward address is registered
dust generation status queries > a dust generation status query with a valid Cardano reward address > should correctly indicate registration status for a non-registered key
dust generation status queries > a dust generation status query with a valid Cardano reward address > should indicate zero generation for registered address without cNIGHT balance
dust generation status queries > a dust generation status query with a valid Cardano reward address > should report the correct value of max capacity for registered address with cNIGHT
dust generation status queries > a dust generation status query with a valid Cardano reward address > should correctly indicate deregistered status for a previously registered Cardano reward address
dust generation status queries > a dust generation status query with multiple valid Cardano reward addresses > should return statuses for multiple Cardano reward addresses in order

dust generation status queries > a dust generation status query with multiple valid Cardano reward addresses > should respond with dust generation statuses according to the requested schema for multiple addresses
dust generation status queries > a dust generation status query with multiple valid Cardano reward addresses > should return an error given the number of addresses is greater than 10
dust generation status queries > a dust generation status query with malformed reward addresses > should return an error when the address is in plain hex string format
dust generation status queries > a dust generation status query with empty list of reward addresses > should return an empty list of dust generation statuses
dust generation status queries > a dust generation status query with a Cardano payment address > should return an error as only Cardano reward addresses are supported
dust generation status queries > a dust generation status query with a Cardano reward address not meant for this network > should return an error reporting the target network mismatch
dust generation status queries > a dust generation status query with duplicate reward addresses > should handle duplicate Cardano reward addresses appropriately
transaction queries > a transaction query by hash > should return the transaction with that hash, given that transaction exists
transaction queries > a transaction query by hash > should return an empty transaction list, given a transaction with that hash doesn't exist
transaction queries > a transaction query by hash > should return an error, given a hash is invalid (malformed)
transaction queries > a transaction query by hash > should return an error when called with an empty offset object
transaction queries > a transaction query by identifier > should return the transaction with that identifier, given that transaction exists
transaction queries > a transaction query by identifier > should return an empty list of transactions, given a transaction with that identifier doesn't exist
transaction queries > a transaction query by identifier > should return an error, given an invalid identifier
transaction queries > a transaction query by hash and identifier > should return an error, as only one parameter at a time can be used
genesis transactions > transaction queries to the genesis block transactions > should return utxos related to 4 pre-fund wallets
genesis transactions > transaction queries to the genesis block transactions > should return utxos with 1 token type
genesis transactions > transaction queries to the genesis block transactions > should return utxos sorted by outputIndex in ascending order
genesis transactions > transaction queries to the genesis block transactions > should return system transactions when queried by hash
genesis transactions > transaction queries to the genesis block transactions > should not contain RegularTransaction-specific fields on system transactions
genesis transactions > schema validation > should respond with full transaction data according to the expected schema
genesis transactions > schema validation > should respond with system transactions according to the expected schema
genesis transactions > schema validation > should contain both regular and system transactions
genesis transactions > schema validation > should respond with regular transactions according to the expected schema
genesis transactions > schema validation > should respond with nested ledger events and unshielded outputs according to the expected schema
zswap merkle tree collapsed update queries > a collapsed update query with valid index range > should return a collapsed update for a valid index range
zswap merkle tree collapsed update queries > a collapsed update query with valid index range > should respond with a collapsed update according to the expected schema
zswap merkle tree collapsed update queries > a collapsed update query with valid index range > should return a collapsed update for the full genesis zswap range
zswap merkle tree collapsed update queries > a collapsed update query with equal start and end indices > should return a valid update when startIndex equals endIndex
zswap merkle tree collapsed update queries > a collapsed update query idempotency > should return identical results for the same query parameters
zswap merkle tree collapsed update queries > a collapsed update query with invalid index range > should return an error when startIndex is greater than endIndex
zswap merkle tree collapsed update queries > a collapsed update query with invalid index range > should return an error when indices are negative
zswap merkle tree collapsed update queries > a collapsed update query with invalid index range > should return an error when endIndex is beyond the indexed range
block subscriptions > a subscription to block updates without parameters > should stream blocks starting from the latest block
block subscriptions > a subscription to block updates without parameters > should stream blocks adhering to the expected schema
block subscriptions > a subscription to block updates by hash > should stream blocks starting from the block with that hash, given that hash exists
block subscriptions > a subscription to block updates by hash > should return an error message, given that hash doesn't exist
block subscriptions > a subscription to block updates by hash > should return an error message, given that hash is invalid
block subscriptions > a subscription to block updates by height > should stream blocks from the block with that height, given that height exists
block subscriptions > a subscription to block updates by height > should return an error message, given that height is higher than the latest block height
block subscriptions > a subscription to block updates by height > should return an error message, given that height is invalid
block subscriptions > a subscription to block updates by height and hash > should return an error message, as only one parameter at a time can be used
block subscriptions > regular transaction fees > should report ledger paidFees and estimatedFees on regular transactions
contract action subscriptions > a subscription to contract action updates without parameters > should stream contract actions from the latest available block
contract action subscriptions > a subscription to contract action updates without parameters > should stream contract actions adhering to the expected schema
contract action subscriptions > a subscription to contract action updates with block hash offset > should stream historical and new contract actions from a specific block hash
dust generations subscription > streaming dust generation entries > should stream dust generation events for a valid dust address in bech32m format
dust generations subscription > subscription error handling > should return an error for an invalid dust address
dust generations subscription > subscription error handling > should return an error for a valid address that is meant for another networkid
dust generations subscription > subscription error handling > should return an error for a valid dust address passed in hex format
dust generations subscription > transactionHash on dust generation events (#1114) > first item transactionHash resolves via transactions(offset)
dust ledger event subscriptions > a subscription to dust ledger events without offset (default replay) > streams events in ledger order
dust ledger event subscriptions > subscription with explicit offset > streams events in ledger order starting from the specified ID
dust ledger event subscriptions > subscription with explicit offset > validates historical dust events against schema
dust ledger event subscriptions > subscription error handling > should return an error for unknown field
dust ledger event subscriptions > subscription error handling > rejects negative offset ID with an error
dust nullifier transactions subscription > streaming dust nullifier transactions with block range > should stream transactions within a block range and complete
dust nullifier transactions subscription > subscription error handling > should return an error for empty nullifier prefixes
dust nullifier transactions subscription > subscription error handling > should return an error when fromBlock is greater than toBlock
dust nullifier transactions subscription > transactionHash on dust nullifier events (#1114) > first event transactionHash resolves via transactions(offset)
shielded nullifier transactions subscription > streaming shielded nullifier transactions with block range > should stream transactions within a block range and complete
shielded nullifier transactions subscription > subscription error handling > should return an error for empty nullifier prefixes
shielded nullifier transactions subscription > subscription error handling > should return an error for an empty-string nullifier prefix element
shielded nullifier transactions subscription > subscription error handling > should return an error when fromBlock is greater than toBlock
shielded nullifier transactions subscription > transactionHash on shielded nullifier events (#1114) > first event transactionHash resolves via transactions(offset)
shielded transaction subscriptions > opening a session with viewing key > should return a session ID, given a valid viewing key
shielded transaction subscriptions > opening a session with viewing key > should return an error, given an unsupported hex format viewing key
shielded transaction subscriptions > opening a session with viewing key > should return an error, given an invalid viewing key
shielded transaction subscriptions > opening a session with viewing key > should return an error, given a valid viewing key meant for a different network
shielded transaction subscriptions > closing a session with session ID > should terminate the session successfully, given a valid session ID
shielded transaction subscriptions > closing a session with session ID > should return an error, given an invalid session ID
shielded transaction subscriptions > a subscription to wallet updates providing viewing key only > should stream wallet events starting from the beginning, given there are relevant transactions
shielded transaction subscriptions > a subscription to wallet updates providing viewing key only > should stream shielded transaction events adhering to the expected schema
shielded transaction subscriptions > a subscription to wallet updates providing viewing key only > should be able to use highestZswapEndIndex from progress event in collapsed update query
shielded transaction subscriptions > a subscription to wallet updates providing viewing key only > should reject shieldedTransactions subscription when using expired session ID
subscription quotas (HAL-03 / SSE-196) > per-connection concurrent subscription cap > should reject a subscription beyond the per-connection cap
subscription quotas (HAL-03 / SSE-196) > per-connection concurrent subscription cap > should free a slot when an active subscription is closed

unshielded transaction subscriptions > a subscription to unshielded transaction events by address > should stream unshielded transaction events related to that address, given that address has transactions
unshielded transaction subscriptions > a subscription to unshielded transaction events by address > should stream unshielded transaction events up to highest transaction id
unshielded transaction subscriptions > a subscription to unshielded transaction events by address > should stream unshielded transaction events that adhere to the expected schema

unshielded transaction subscriptions > a subscription to unshielded transaction events by address > should only return a transaction progress message with highest transaction = 0, given that address does not have transactions
unshielded transaction subscriptions > a subscription to unshielded transaction events by address > should return an error message, given the address provided is in hex format
unshielded transaction subscriptions > a subscription to unshielded transaction events by address > should return an error message, given the address provided is for another network

unshielded transaction subscriptions > a subscription to unshielded transaction events by address and transaction id > should return a stream of transactions containing that address, starting from transaction id = 0
unshielded transaction subscriptions > a subscription to unshielded transaction events by address and transaction id > should return an error message, given the transaction id provided is negative

unshielded transaction subscriptions > a subscription to unshielded transaction events by address and transaction id > should only return a transaction progress message without streaming transactions, given that the transaction id provided is bigger number
unshielded transaction subscriptions > a subscription to unshielded transaction events by address and transaction id > should start a transaction stream from the given transaction id
unshielded transaction subscriptions > a subscription to unshielded transaction events by address and transaction id > should return an error message, given the address is provided in hex format
wallet connect options (startIndex) > opening a session with startIndex > should accept startIndex = 0 (no-op equivalent of unset options)
wallet connect options (startIndex) > opening a session with startIndex > should skip historical scan when startIndex equals the current tip
wallet connect options (startIndex) > opening a session with startIndex > should accept startIndex past the current tip (fast-forward)
zswap ledger event subscriptions > a subscription to zswap ledger events without offset (default replay) > streams events in ledger order
zswap ledger event subscriptions > subscription with explicit offset > streams events starting from the specified ID
zswap ledger event subscriptions > subscription with explicit offset > validates historical zswap events against schema
zswap ledger event subscriptions > subscription error handling > should return an error for unknown field
zswap ledger event subscriptions > subscription error handling > rejects negative offset ID with an error
